description: Letter fragment. In Arabic script, with the Hebrew names (Shabbetay b. [...] and Barukh) written in Hebrew script. Mentions Shavuʿot (al-ʿAnṣara) and a Christian named Buṭrus and  al-Mawlā Ibn al-Sabīʿī (="the son of the Seventh").
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
